channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Three more players added to Spikers' Turf All-Star lineup
item.description: The ABS-CBN News report announces the inclusion of Malabunga, Marasigan, and Schnake in the Spikers' Turf All-Star cast, further strengthening the lineup for the upcoming showcase event. While the art...

item.title: Taliban assures safe return for Afghans stranded in Qatar
item.description: The Taliban government on Saturday reassured Afghans currently in Qatar that they may return home with full confidence. These individuals, who fled Afghanistan fearing reprisals for working with US fo...

item.title: Adam Thomas wins I'm A Celebrity South Africa amid controversy and cast disputes
item.description: Adam Thomas was crowned winner of I'm A Celebrity South Africa’s All Stars series following a tense and controversial live finale marked by ongoing disputes among contestants. The programme, which had...

item.title: 'Michael': A Biopic That Focuses on Hits Over Depth
item.description: The Lionsgate film 'Michael' is a biopic of Michael Jackson produced with close family involvement, including his siblings and nephew Jaafar Jackson, who portrays the pop icon. Directed by Antoine Fuq...

item.title: BHP signs deal with China to price some iron ore sales in yuan
item.description: BHP has reportedly entered a preliminary agreement with China Mineral Resources Group (CMRG), a state-backed iron ore buyer, to use a yuan-based spot index for some of its iron ore sales to China. Thi...

item.title: Gen Z increasingly turns to entrepreneurship as AI disrupts entry-level job opportunities
item.description: Young people entering the workforce are facing a particularly challenging moment, marked by a sluggish job market and the growing impact of artificial intelligence on entry-level roles. Many recent gr...

item.title: One killed in political clash between BJP and Congress supporters in Mehsana before local polls
item.description: A violent clash between political supporters in Mehsana, Gujarat, has left one person dead and two others seriously injured just before the local municipal elections. The victim, Miten Chaudhary, was ...

item.title: Pedestrian Critically Injured in Brampton Motor Vehicle Collision
item.description: A serious motor vehicle collision in Brampton, Ontario, has left a pedestrian in critical condition. Peel Regional Police responded to the scene, but details regarding the circumstances of the crash r...

item.title: EFCC Nabs Cameroonian Businessman Over ₦1.5bn Fraud in Lagos
item.description: Operatives of the Lagos Zonal Directorate 2 of the Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) have apprehended a Cameroonian businessman, Bekono Eric, for allegedly defrauding a major Nigerian ba...

item.title: Protests in Manipur Turn Violent as Demonstrators Demand Justice and Relief
item.description: On Saturday, Manipur witnessed a significant escalation in tensions as thousands of demonstrators demanding lasting peace clashed with police in Imphal. The protests, led by the Coordinating Committee...

item.title: Ancient Giant Octopus Predated Dinosaurs, New Research Shows
item.description: New research suggests that colossal octopuses, potentially reaching lengths of up to 20 meters, were top marine predators during the Late Cretaceous period, a time when dinosaurs still roamed the Eart...

item.title: Oburu Oginga Responds to Orengo's Challenge for ODM Leadership
item.description: Siaya Senator Oburu Oginga has hit back at Governor James Orengo following a public dispute over the leadership of the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM). The rift began when Orengo, during a rally in N...

item.title: President Zardari Embarks on China Visit to Discuss Economic Cooperation and CPEC Progress
item.description: President Asif Ali Zardari left for China on Saturday for a multi-city visit aimed at reinforcing Pakistan-China economic relations and furthering initiatives under the China-Pakistan Economic Corrido...

item.title: NLEX Road Warriors Secure Victory Over Terra Firma with Bolick's Clutch Shot
item.description: The NLEX Road Warriors pulled off a thrilling victory against the Terra Firma Dyip last night, thanks to a game-winning three-pointer from Matthew Bolick. With just seconds left on the clock and the s...

item.title: Flooding Submerges Homes and Markets in Jalingo, Taraba State
item.description: Heavy rain hit Jalingo, Taraba State early Saturday morning, causing widespread flooding across the city. From around 2:30 a.m. to 11:30 a.m., rainwater overwhelmed low-lying areas like Mile Six, Mafi...

item.title: Greytown Residents Form New Association to Improve Communication with Umvoti Municipality
item.description: Greytown residents have recently established the Greytown Resident and Ratepayer Association (GRRA) to enhance communication and collaboration with the Umvoti Municipality. The initiative was coordina...

item.title: Ibrahim “Class” Mgenda secures two WBC titles after dominant win in Bangkok
item.description: Tanzanian professional boxer Ibrahim Mgenda, well known by his ring name “Class”, has achieved a big milestone in his career after winning two World Boxing Council (WBC) international titles in Bangko...

item.title: Diepkloof Outage: Eskom Debt Causes Supply Disruption
item.description: Johannesburg’s City Power has explained that the recent power outage in Diepkloof, Soweto, which resulted in protests and looting, is directly linked to an outstanding debt owed to Eskom. Following re...

item.title: Vilma Santos makes a heartfelt request for Luis Manzano's birthday on Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal
item.description: ABS-CBN Studios shared a heartwarming story featuring veteran actress and mom Vilma Santos, who has a special request for her son, Luis Manzano, on his birthday. The news highlights Vilma's personal a...

item.title: Israel Expands Strikes Across Southern and Eastern Lebanon
item.description: Lebanese state media reported a new wave of Israeli strikes, artillery fire, and drone activity across southern and eastern Lebanon, signaling a broader and more intense phase of attacks. The reported...
